title: Python packaging still broken in 2025: a retrospective
snippet: After 15 years of packaging tools (distutils, setuptools, pip, pipenv, poetry, pdm, uv) Python still lacks a single blessed solution. Every project requires a different tool.
author: hn_user_frank

title: uv is fast but breaks existing pip workflows — migration pain
snippet: uv is 10x faster than pip but requires rewriting pyproject.toml for every project. Not backward compatible enough for enterprise adoption.
author: hn_user_gina
